svg.title: LandRight Build Order — 6 Phases
svg.desc: Phased build plan for the full LandRight app rebuild
svg.text: PHASE 1 — FOUNDATION
Database + Auth + Security baseline
PostgreSQL schema · SQLAlchemy + Alembic migrations · JWT auth endpoints
bcrypt passwords · SlowAPI rate limiting · upload validation middleware
Everything else depends on this. Do it first, do it right.
PHASE 2 — CORE AGENT
Profile + LangGraph ReAct + Tool Registry + MCP
Profile CRUD endpoints · swap Bedrock model → Claude Haiku
ReAct agent loop · 6 MCP tools · LangSmith tracing · chat saves to DB
First time the agent is genuinely useful — tool-calling with real user data.
PHASE 3 — MEMORY + DOCUMENTS
User memory · I-20 upload + parsing · conversation summarization
Memory table + get/update tools · PDF parsing → extract program end date, major
S3 document storage · summarize old messages after N turns
Agent now remembers you across sessions. I-20 personalizes everything.
PHASE 4 — PROACTIVE FEATURES
Nightly scheduler · deadline engine · email notifications · human approval
APScheduler nightly job · deadline calculator (OPT window, tax date, SSN eligibility)
AWS SES email · human-in-the-loop approval UI for consequential actions
App initiates contact. Reactive → Proactive. This is the "wow" moment.
PHASE 5 — FRONTEND
React app — auth, dashboard, chat, profile, document upload
Login/signup · onboarding wizard · stage progress tracker · deadlines widget
Chat interface · I-20 upload UI · human approval modal · dark theme
Built last so API is stable. Mock API responses while building if needed.
PHASE 6 — EVAL + MONITORING
LLMTrace table · admin eval dashboard · thumbs up/down · metrics
Log every tool call: input, output, latency, token count, success/failure
Admin view: question → retrieved chunks → answer → feedback · in-memory caching
Built last when you have real data to evaluate. Screams AI Engineer.
Est: P1 3–4 days · P2 4–5 days · P3 3–4 days · P4 3 days · P5 5–7 days · P6 2–3 days
